attractions.name: Umngot River (Dawki)
attractions.description: Famous for its crystal-clear waters, the Umngot River creates an almost surreal illusion—boats appear to float on air. Surrounded by lush hills and open skies

attractions.name: Khrang Suri Waterfalls
attractions.description: Known for its vivid blue waters and dramatic setting, this waterfall feels almost hidden within the forest. A short trek down leads you to a natural pool at the base

attractions.name: Umngot (Dawki) River
attractions.description: Famed for its crystal-clear water; optional boating when river conditions permit
attractions.entry_fee: Free; boating costs ₹400-800 per boat (for 3-4 people)
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

attractions.name: Dawki border viewpoint
attractions.description: Views across to Bangladesh; best in clear weather
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

hotels.name: Betelnut Resort
hotels._source_file: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Surfaces can be slippery at waterfalls — wear proper footwear

connectivity_tips.tip: Remote valleys (Dawki, root-bridge areas) may have weak signal
connectivity_tips._source_file: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf
